data.body: 8f43: plan-review PASS first try, claimed. Added 2 symlink/realpath lock-identity tests (both directions) to test_lock_stale_reclaim.py - deterministic (timeout=1 attempts=1, held lock guarantees LockTimeout). FINDING during teeth check: canonical_tracker's realpath is belt-and-suspenders - the KERNEL resolves the symlink at open()/mkdir() for the concrete lock file, so symlink/realpath callers contend regardless. Tests still validly assert the observable cross-path mutual-exclusion invariant (the ACs). Committing.
